questions.question: Explain the difference between a connection-oriented and connectionless transport protocol. Provide an example of each type.
questions.hint: Describe the characteristics of both connection-oriented and connectionless protocols

questions.question: What is the purpose of the Maximum Segment Size (MSS) in a transport-layer protocol? How does it affect data transmission?
questions.hint: Explain how MSS influences data packet size and transmission efficiency

questions.question: Describe the role of a Transport Layer Header in a data packet. What information is typically included in this header?
questions.hint: List the common fields included in a Transport Layer Header
